LanguageData.ControlSublinkImplant.description: A Pipboy holotape which increases a mechanic's control group count and the work speed of a mechanic's robots. This advanced sublink is encoded with proprietary RobCo firmware for optimal control and reliability. Can be installed up to 6 times for maximum effect.
LanguageData.MechFormfeederImplant.description: A Pipboy holotape which accelerates robot crafting in the gestator. RobCo's proprietary processor firmware ensures maximum efficiency and reliability. Can be installed up to 6 times for increased effect.
LanguageData.RemoteRepairerImplant.description: A Pipboy holotape which allows remote repair of robots. Proprietary RobCo firmware enables remote fault restoration. Can be installed up to 3 times for increased range.
LanguageData.RemoteShielderImplant.description: A Pipboy holotape which allows remote projection of personal defense shields onto robots. Proprietary RobCo firmware ensures reliable shield deployment. Can be installed up to 3 times for increased range and energy.
LanguageData.RepairProbeImplant.description: A Pipboy holotape which increases the speed of robot repairs. Direct neural interface and proprietary RobCo diagnostics allow rapid and reliable restoration. Can be installed up to 6 times for increased effect.
